summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of PARTYBOSS party bus rental website with new SEO-optimized content for Oberösterreich region. All features working correctly including new city pages (Wels, Steyr), homepage redesign with 3 user-uploaded images, and navigation.
passed_tests: Homepage hero section displays H1 with 'Partybus mieten in Oberösterreich' and mentions Linz, Wels, Steyr
Homepage hero CTA button 'Partykosten berechnen' links to /kontakt
Homepage Block 1 (About) displays text about Partybusse in Oberösterreich with 4 advantages (Soundsystem, Lichtshow, Gaming-Zone, Flexibilität)
Homepage Block 2 (Geographic) displays 4 location cards (Linz, Wels, Steyr, Braunau am Inn) with correct links
Homepage Block 3 (Social Proof) displays testimonial quote and 3 'Why Us' cards
Homepage shows 3 user-uploaded bus images (all loading correctly)
New city page /partybus-wels loads correctly with Wels-specific content
New city page /partybus-steyr loads correctly with Steyr-specific content
Cities section in homepage shows 6 cities (Linz, Wels, Steyr, Wien, Salzburg, Graz) with correct links
Navigation works: all pages accessible (Home, Partybusse, Events, Preise, Ablauf, Über uns, Kontakt)
Homepage event types section renders correctly
Homepage featured buses section renders with 3 bus cards
Homepage CTA section at bottom with 'Nicht nach Wien fahren' text
Dark neon theme with glassmorphism effects working correctly
critical_code_review_comments: React Router future flag warnings in console - consider adding v7_startTransition and v7_relativeSplatPath flags to Router configuration for future compatibility
context_for_next_testing_agent: All homepage SEO content for Oberösterreich region is working. New city pages Wels and Steyr are functional. Three user-uploaded images (HERO_IMAGE, SCHOOL_BUS_IMAGE, DOUBLE_DECKER_IMAGE) are loading correctly. Navigation to all pages works. Dark neon theme with glassmorphism effects is rendering properly.

hero_section.h1_text: PARTYBUS MIETEN IN OBERÖSTERREICH - DEIN FEST AUF RÄDERN IN LINZ, WELS & STEYR
hero_section.subtitle: Mobiler Club für dein Fest. Einzigartige Partybusse in Linz, Wels, Steyr und ganz Oberösterreich.

locations_section.heading: Dein Fest beginnt hier: ganz Oberösterreich

cta_section.heading: Nicht nach Wien fahren — feiere bei dir!
